full_suite.failure_notes: No event-head-owned test failed. Eight known sandbox socket-bind failures: 3 court_keypoint_review_server, 3 review_input_server, and 2 sam3dbody_persistent_worker. Eighteen unrelated pre-existing court/IMG1605 fixture-data drift failures: compare_court_proposals (1), court_finding_technology_benchmark (12), court_keypoint_no_tap_eval (1), court_keypoint_partial_labels (1), court_partial_geometry (2), overlapping_court_calibration_eval (1). Two concurrent-lane failures appeared during this lane: best_stack revision 13 versus test expecting 12, and select_players_from_pool remaining category=unknown in the scaffold index.

honest_issues: The required wide suite is red, so the overall result cannot be PASS despite all local event-head acceptance checks passing.
GPU utilization and the post-Lever-1 ≥10,000-window gate require the manager GPU leg and were not attempted under the no-network/no-GPU sandbox.
The measured local multiplier is 19.43x, above the 3-12x projection; the measured value is reported unchanged.
The frozen checkpoint manifest contains VM-absolute media paths. Reproduction therefore used the fresh local pre-change manifest preserving the old splits and local media paths.
The current rebalanced, partially staged corpus yields 5,646 train windows; full staging is still required for the ≥10,000 gate.
Storage audit exited 1 because previously allowlisted artifacts are missing, but reported zero unknown large tracked or untracked files. Dead-code audit passed with 593 sources and zero unknowns.
VERIFIED=0 remains binding. BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) none; checkpoint creation and any PENDING manifest entry belong to the manager GPU leg.
next: Manager should first reconcile the concurrent best-stack/scaffold tests, then execute VM_RUN_PLAN.md and report ≥60% GPU utilization, ≥10,000 train windows, ≥50-clip frozen threshold sweep, hashes, cost, and teardown evidence.
